notes: Reliability & compliance fixes. A duplicate cheque number is now caught BEFORE a payment posts (Payments, Vendor Bills, Fuel, Staff Advances and withholding remittances), so a clash can no longer leave a payment posted with no cheque in the register. Reversed withholdings no longer appear on the GRA return schedules or certificates. A multi-approver approval dead-end is resolved, and the aged-debtor/creditor totals now include future-dated items. Installing: download the arm64 dmg (Apple Silicon) or the plain dmg (Intel Mac); on first open, right-click the app and choose Open. Windows: run the .exe.
